conflicts.title: Mod Conflict
conflicts.desc: Multiple mods for the same object are enabled.
conflicts.resolution_desc: Select the mod you want to keep active, or ignore the warning to allow this specific combination.

toast.resolved: Conflict resolved: only selected mod is enabled.

resolution.title: Name Conflict Detected
resolution.description: Both an enabled and disabled version of {{name}} exist in the same directory. Compare them and choose what to keep.

context.active_warning: However, this mod is currently Active (Enabled). Active mods cannot be modified directly.

context_dialog.title: Change Context for Active Mod?
context_dialog.move_message: "{{modName}}" will be moved into the {{target}} context.
context_dialog.active_warning: This mod is currently active. Moving it can affect the currently applied setup.
context_dialog.confirm_checkbox: I understand the impact and want to continue.

duplicate_warning.title: Possible Duplicate Active Mod
duplicate_warning.description: {{targetName}} already has other enabled mods in the same target. Choose how to proceed.

drag_overlay.title: Move to Object
drag_overlay.subtitle: Drop this folder on an object to reassign it.

ignore_management.title: Ignored Conflict Rules
ignore_management.subtitle: Review object conflicts you previously allowed.
ignore_management.empty_subtitle: Ignored conflict rules will appear here.
ignore_management.note: Revoking a rule makes this object eligible for conflict warnings again.
